stories.headline: Bitcoin stalls at $80K as $5B USDT liquidity meets oil-driven selloff
stories.tldr: BTC reversed from $79,500 Monday as a fresh oil surge triggered a broader crypto pullback, capping a four-week run that delivered its best monthly gains in a year.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: ETF inflows and $5B in fresh USDT supply argue for upside, but $80K is now the gauntlet — bulls need a clean break or risk a deeper retrace into FOMC week.
the_details: BTC last $79,124, +2% on the day, $1.58T market cap; ETH at $2,320 still capped under the $2,400 mid-month high.
April stablecoin float grew $5B according to CoinDesk; analysts cite sidelined capital waiting on a confirmed break above $80K.
FOMC meeting and stalled U.S.-Iran peace talks set the macro tape this week; WTI oil holding above $90/bbl pressuring risk.

stories.headline: 100+ crypto firms pressure Senate Banking to mark up Clarity Act before recess
stories.tldr: A coalition of 100+ exchanges, custodians and developers including Coinbase and Ripple sent a public letter urging Senate Banking to mark up the Clarity Act now.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: With the market-structure bill stuck behind tariff and budget fights, industry is racing to secure floor time before midterm politics swallow the calendar.
the_details: Letter delivered April 23 with signatories spanning Coinbase, Ripple, and a16z portfolio firms.
House companion bill cleared on a bipartisan vote in 2025; Senate version has been pending markup since February.
Industry argues delay is freezing capital deployment as token-issuance legal status remains gray.

stories.headline: SEC frees DeFi front-ends from broker-dealer registration in landmark staff letter
stories.tldr: SEC staff said it will not object to 'Covered User Interface Providers' operating crypto-asset-securities front-ends without registering as broker-dealers.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: First U.S. regulatory green light for DeFi front-ends — a foundational unlock for Uniswap-style apps that touch tokenized securities, conditional on opt-in safeguards.
the_details: Staff statement issued April 13, 2026; part of the broader Project Crypto rollout under Chair Atkins.
Builds on the March 17 SEC-CFTC joint 68-page interpretive release establishing a five-category token taxonomy.
Conditions include disclosure obligations and refraining from holding customer assets or providing investment advice.

stories.headline: Blockchain Capital seeks $700M across two new funds as crypto VC consolidates
stories.tldr: Blockchain Capital is targeting $700M across two new vehicles — its largest raise yet — as crypto VC dollars concentrate into top-tier names.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Even as smaller crypto funds shutter or pause deploys, top-tier shops are still printing — concentrated capital means concentrated bets and fewer Series A lifelines for everyone else.
the_details: Bloomberg reports the $700M target is split between an early-stage fund and an opportunities fund.
Follows mega-fund formation by Paradigm and a16z crypto in prior cycles.
Overall crypto VC funding tracking down ~40% year-over-year according to Galaxy Research.

stories.headline: Bhutan offloads another 250 BTC, sovereign stack now down 73% from 2024 peak
stories.tldr: Bhutan moved 250 BTC on April 13, pushing 2026 outflows past $240M as the kingdom's sovereign holdings fell 73% from their October 2024 peak.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: One of the few sovereign Bitcoin treasuries is steadily de-risking through this cycle — a quiet signal that even buy-the-dip national balance sheets are taking chips off the table.
the_details: Arkham data tagged the April 13 transfer to a Binance deposit wallet.
Holdings peaked above $1.3B in October 2024 and have shrunk dramatically as BTC oscillates near $80K.
Bhutan is among the only nations with publicly known mining operations and on-chain visible reserves.
